name: General Client Inquiry for Development
description: A professional client asks a technical question about React state management and requests a standard hourly quote, keeping all interactions official and on-platform.

conversation.speaker: buyer
conversation.message: Hi, I have a React Native mobile application and we are experiencing some performance lags when updating our state management. We currently use Redux ToolKit. Are you familiar with optimizing React Native state?

conversation.speaker: seller
conversation.message: Yes, I have worked on React Native performance optimization before. Often it's related to unnecessary re-renders or large payloads in the Redux store. Could you share details of where the lags occur?

conversation.speaker: buyer
conversation.message: It mainly happens on our main dashboard list view when filtering items. I can share a sanitized code snippet of the component if that helps. What is your standard hourly rate for auditing React Native apps?

conversation.speaker: seller
conversation.message: That would be perfect. My rate is $50/hr on-platform. I can audit the component and give you an estimate of the required optimization work.

conversation.speaker: buyer
conversation.message: That sounds very reasonable. Let me prepare the component code and I will send it to you shortly. We will keep everything through the official contract here.
